title: workspaces — health probes
description: Health probes registered with Foundation's health aggregator (surfaced by `GET /api/health` and `/up` on every host). Each probe is bucketed as `liveness` (process is alive), `readiness` (process is ready to serve traffic), or `startup` (one-time boot check). `critical=true` probes fail the aggregate health status when they fail.

probes.name: workspace-scope-resolvable
probes.description: Attempts to resolve a canary Workspace row via the `resolve.workspace` middleware pipeline. Verifies the resolver, the global scope, and the workspace cache are all wired.

probes.name: application-resolvable
probes.description: Verifies at least one Application row exists and the default Application resolver returns it. Fails on a fresh install before workspaces:seed-defaults runs.

probes.name: domain-dns-reachable
probes.description: Performs a DNS TXT lookup against a canary hostname owned by the platform. Detects egress DNS failures that would break VerifyDomainDnsJob. Non-critical because the platform can degrade to 'domain verification queued' without failing all traffic.

probes.name: workspaces-not-orphaned
probes.description: Counts Workspaces whose `application_id` no longer resolves to an Application row (indicative of a partial delete or corrupted seed). Emits `workspaces.orphaned.count` metric. Fails if > 0.

probes.name: workspaces-hook-registry-populated
probes.description: Boot-time only. Verifies LogContextWorkspaceHook + CachePrefixWorkspaceHook registered on the WorkspacesHookDispatcher. Detects a bad #[AsWorkspacesHook] discovery pass.
